title: PackManifest
description: Concrete manifest for a focused pack. Defines identity, lifecycle, attachment, dependencies, eligibility, content summary, adapter requirements, configuration keys, and capability contributions. Fulfills pack-and-adapter-architecture-governance.md §5.2 and §21.2. Referenced by legal-market-profile.schema.json and effective-tenant-configuration-plan.schema.json via packId.

displayName.description: Human-readable name (e.g. 'Korean Language Pack', 'PhilHealth Regulatory Pack').

description.description: Brief description of what the pack provides.

packFamily.description: Which of the 7 focused pack families this pack belongs to. Per pack-and-adapter §6.

version.description: Semver version per pack-and-adapter §13. MAJOR = breaking config/dependency changes. MINOR = non-breaking additions. PATCH = fixes and corrections.

lifecycle.description: Governance and lifecycle metadata per pack-and-adapter §12.

attachment.description: Scope attachment: what entity this pack primarily attaches to and available override scopes. Per pack-and-adapter §9.

dependencies.description: Declared dependencies and conflicts with other packs. Per pack-and-adapter §10. Forms a DAG — cycles are invalid.

eligibility.description: Criteria for this pack to be activatable for a given scope. Per pack-and-adapter §11. Empty arrays mean no restriction on that criterion.

contentSummary.description: Summary of pack contents. Generic fields plus optional family-specific metadata per pack-and-adapter §6.

adapterRequirements.description: Adapters this pack requires or benefits from. Per pack-and-adapter §7, §15.

configurationKeys.description: Configuration keys this pack provides or modifies. Used for composition conflict detection per pack-and-adapter §17.

capabilityContributions.description: Capabilities this pack contributes to. Per pack-and-adapter §19. Feeds claim-gating evaluation.

packFamilyEnum.description: The 7 focused pack families from pack-and-adapter §6.

packLifecycleStateEnum.description: Pack lifecycle states per pack-and-adapter §12. Transitions: draft→validated (schema + dependency validation), validated→tested (content + integration validation), tested→published (quality gates passed), published→activated (eligibility evaluation passed), activated↔deactivated (explicit operator action), any→retired (no active dependents).

implementationLocusEnum.description: Which repo owns the pack content per pack-and-adapter §8. platform = vista-evolved-platform. distro = vista-evolved-vista-distro. cross-repo = coordinated across both.

attachmentEntityEnum.description: Entity types a pack can attach to per pack-and-adapter §9 attachment matrix. system = global. legal-market = market-scoped. tenant = tenant-scoped. facility = facility-scoped. service-line = service-line-scoped.

dependencyTypeEnum.description: Dependency relationship types per pack-and-adapter §10. required = must be active for this pack to activate. recommended = should be active for full functionality. conflicts = must NOT be active simultaneously.

adapterTypeEnum.description: Adapter types per pack-and-adapter §7. vista = VistA subsystem adapter. external-system = third-party integration. stub = integration-pending placeholder. bridge = cross-system data bridge.

configurationKeyActionEnum.description: How this pack interacts with a configuration key. provides = introduces a new key. modifies = adjusts an existing key's value. overrides = replaces an existing key's value entirely.

capabilityContributionTypeEnum.description: How this pack contributes to a capability. required = capability is not claimable without this pack. enhances = capability works without this pack but gains features with it.

lifecycleBlock.description: Governance and lifecycle metadata for the pack.

owner.description: Team or role responsible for this pack's lifecycle (e.g. 'platform-team', 'ph-market-team').

implementationLocus.description: Which repo owns the pack content.

attachmentBlock.description: Scope attachment per pack-and-adapter §9. Defines what entity this pack primarily binds to and at what additional scopes it can be overridden.

primaryEntity.description: Primary entity this pack attaches to. Derived from pack family per §9 attachment matrix.

overrideScopes.description: Additional scopes where this pack's settings can be overridden per §9.3 inheritance. Lower scope overrides higher scope.

dependencyEntry.description: A dependency or conflict declaration with another pack.

packId.description: Pack ID of the dependency target.

rationale.description: Why this dependency or conflict exists.

eligibilityBlock.description: Criteria for this pack to be activatable per pack-and-adapter §11. Each array acts as a whitelist; empty array means no restriction on that criterion.

legalMarkets.description: Legal-market IDs where this pack is eligible (e.g. 'PH', 'US', 'KR'). Empty = eligible for any market.

facilityTypes.description: Facility-type identifiers where this pack applies. Empty = any facility type.

serviceLines.description: Service-line or specialty identifiers where this pack applies. Empty = any service line.

infrastructureRequirements.description: Infrastructure prerequisites (e.g. 'vista-utf8-lane', 'orthanc-dicom', 'keycloak-oidc'). Empty = no special infrastructure needed.

licenseRequirements.description: License or entitlement prerequisites (e.g. 'imaging-module', 'telehealth-module'). Empty = no special licensing needed.

contentSummaryBlock.description: Summary of pack contents. Generic fields for all families, plus optional family-specific metadata per pack-and-adapter §6 per-family attributes.

contentTypes.description: Types of content in this pack (e.g. 'translations', 'rules', 'templates', 'configuration', 'coding-tables', 'connector-config', 'clinical-content').

artifactCount.description: Number of content artifacts in this pack.

languageTag.description: BCP 47 language tag. Applicable to language packs (e.g. 'ko', 'fil', 'es').

translationCoverage.description: Translation coverage percentage (0-100). Applicable to language packs.

localeIdentifier.description: CLDR locale identifier. Applicable to locale packs (e.g. 'en-PH', 'ko-KR').

complianceFrameworks.description: Compliance framework identifiers. Applicable to regulatory packs (e.g. 'PH-UHC-Act-2019', 'HIPAA').

regulatoryBody.description: Primary regulatory authority. Applicable to regulatory packs (e.g. 'DOH', 'CMS').

codingSystems.description: Coding system identifiers. Applicable to national-standards packs (e.g. 'ICD-10-CM', 'CPT-HCPCS', 'RVS').

standardsBody.description: Standards authority. Applicable to national-standards packs.

payerIdentifiers.description: Payer identifiers covered. Applicable to payer packs.

integrationModes.description: Payer integration modes. Applicable to payer packs (e.g. 'clearinghouse', 'government-portal', 'portal-batch').

clinicalSpecialty.description: Clinical specialty identifier. Applicable to specialty packs (e.g. 'geriatrics', 'cardiology').

specialtyContentAreas.description: Content areas within the specialty. Applicable to specialty packs (e.g. 'templates', 'order-sets', 'clinical-rules').

overrideAreas.description: Configuration areas this pack overrides. Applicable to tenant-overlay packs (e.g. 'branding', 'workflow-defaults', 'report-headers').

adapterRequirementEntry.description: An adapter this pack requires or benefits from.

required.description: Whether the adapter is required (true) or optional/enhancing (false). When required and unavailable, pack degrades to integration-pending per global architecture anti-goal.

fallbackBehavior.description: Expected behavior if adapter is unavailable. Must be 'integration-pending' for required adapters per global architecture. Optional adapters may specify 'degraded' or 'feature-unavailable'.

configurationKeyEntry.description: A configuration key this pack provides or modifies. Used for composition conflict detection per pack-and-adapter §17. Two packs modifying the same key are resolved by precedence (§10.3) or flagged as conflicts.

key.description: Configuration key path using dot notation (e.g. 'billing.claimFormat', 'locale.dateFormat', 'coding.primarySystem').

action.description: How this pack interacts with the key.

capabilityContributionEntry.description: A capability this pack contributes to per pack-and-adapter §19. Required contributions gate capability claims: capability is not claimable until all required packs are active and verified (§19.2).

capabilityId.description: Capability identifier from the capability manifest registry.

contributionType.description: Whether this pack is required for or enhances the capability.

description.description: How this pack contributes to the capability.
